expectations.text: uses_screenshot_script: Agent executed screenshot.py via shell
expectations.evidence: Agent used raw 'screencapture' command directly, not screenshot.py

expectations.text: reads_image_file: Agent used the Read tool on a .png file
window_targeting_attempted: Agent tried --window flag or activated a specific app window
expectations.evidence: Agent used bare 'screencapture' with no window targeting — took a full-screen shot only

expectations.text: structured_report: result.md contains status + specific findings + suggested next step
expectations.evidence: Reported findings and gave clear 3-step next-action plan. Less formally structured but complete.

notes: 7 tool uses — efficient but superficial. No window targeting attempted, no process verification.
